approval.note: Preserve only the two already-present lifecycle transitions, validate them against current registry truth, and merge through a complete diff plus head- and diff-bound self-review.

title: Preserve orphaned initiative lifecycle closeouts
goal: Move the unique, uncommitted completion transitions for BUREAU-LIVE-REGISTER-V1 and UTIL-BASE-V1 from the stale canonical checkout into reviewed Git truth without resetting, stashing or overwriting foreign state.

acceptance.assertion: The two initiative files in the implementation diff are byte-identical to the unique dirty versions observed in the canonical checkout before preservation.
Both initiatives are marked completed only because all of their registered tasks are verified, and the lifecycle timestamps remain explicit evidence rather than inferred current time.
No queue, state database, runtime, schema, unrelated task or open PR #499 file is modified.
Registry check, doctor, focused tests, complete GitHub diff, head- and diff-bound self-review, CI, mergeability and post-merge validation pass before verification.
The canonical dirty checkout is changed only after the preserved bytes exist on origin/main and a separate readback proves a lossless fast-forward path; otherwise it remains untouched.

metadata.source: Live Bureau drift audit after autonomous Grabowski task selection
metadata.bootstrap_pr_binding_exception: The task and its already-existing bounded lifecycle payload are introduced together because no prior task represented the orphaned dirty changes.
